description: Style Note baldessarini is designed for men. With an intense and distinctively masculine scent, you can enjoy the lasting fragrance throughout the day. Smell just as good when you return home as when you leave for your day out with this perfume. Product Details Baldessarini is a spray perfume for men and comes in a glass flask Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 75 ml
